exact_commands_after_approval: git tag -a v0.1.0 -m "Fermata local alpha v0.1.0"

last_minute_rechecks.expect: both lines are identical release commit SHAs
top-level status passed from clean main matching origin/main
top-level status passed and no tag created or pushed

manual_rechecks: Confirm GitHub Actions `ci / golden` passed on the exact release commit.
Confirm maintainer approval reference is present before running tag commands.
Confirm no secrets, credentials, tokens, passwords, or connection strings were added.
Confirm no generated smoke outputs, temporary build outputs, or service records are staged.
expected_evidence_to_keep: tag object SHA after local tag creation
GitHub Actions `ci / golden` URL for the release commit

rollback_roll_forward_rule.local_tag_created_not_pushed: Delete the local tag with `git tag -d v0.1.0`, fix forward on a new commit, and rerun every pre-tag recheck.
rollback_roll_forward_rule.tag_pushed: Do not retarget or delete the pushed tag without an explicit maintainer decision record; fix forward with a new commit and follow-on release decision.

non_claims: This packet is not maintainer approval.
This packet does not create a source-control tag.
This packet does not push a source-control tag.
This packet does not claim hosted production readiness.
This packet does not claim remote adapter safety.
next_required_effect: Explicit maintainer approval is required before creating or pushing v0.1.0.
